Id1.text: Adam Koc, who won the Virtuti Militari award, fought in World War I.

Id2.text: Adam Koc fought in WWI and he was awarded the Virtuti Militari award.

Id3.text: Adam Koc fought in WW1 and received the Virtuti Militari award.
